category_sources: Official GitHub README describes talhelper as a helper for creating Talos clusters in a GitOps repository with SOPS support.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site title and GitHub README use "Talhelper".
docs_sources: Official project homepage points to budimanjojo.github.io/talhelper, with installation, guides, and CLI reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/budimanjojo/talhelper; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and docs describe Talos cluster configuration, GitOps workflow, talhelper genconfig/gensecret, and SOPS-encrypted manifest support.
